view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for automatic link generation at booking confirmation is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for automatic link generation at booking confirmation is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided in the linked use case clearly demonstrates that the system automatically creates a unique Zoom meeting link upon booking confirmation, which is included in the confirmation email. This directly supports the requirement for automatic link generation. The specific scenario described in the use case confirms that the functionality is operational and meets the stated need.
